mapper.select: SELECT id, patient_id, doctor_id, registration_date, time_slot, visit_type, status FROM registration
SELECT id, patient_id, doctor_id, registration_date, time_slot, visit_type, status FROM registration WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY registration_date DESC
SELECT id, patient_id, doctor_id, registration_date, time_slot, visit_type, status FROM registration WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} ORDER BY registration_date DESC, time_slot
SELECT * FROM v_patient_outpatient_history WHERE patient_no = (SELECT patient_no FROM patient WHERE id = #{patientId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO registration (patient_id, doctor_id, registration_date, time_slot, visit_type, status) VALUES (#{patientId}, #{doctorId}, #{registrationDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{visitType}, #{status})
